_comment: Branch-protection / required-checks for main, codified in-repo (TEST-006). This is the source of truth a repo admin applies; it makes the gate provable from the artifact instead of an invisible server-side setting. Code ownership of the root-of-trust paths (internal/crypto, internal/signing[/proto], internal/store, tools/trstctllint) is in .github/CODEOWNERS. Apply with: gh api -X PUT repos/ctlplne/trstctl/branches/main/protection --input .github/branch-protection.json (or import into Terraform's github_branch_protection). docs/branch-protection.md explains each field and how to apply/verify it. docs/branch_protection_test.go asserts this file stays in bidirectional sync with fixed CI/security job names so a renamed check cannot silently drop out of the required set and a new gate cannot run without blocking main unless it has a documented exemption.
